title.en: Truncated a place in the depths of Montenegro.

content.en:
Truncated a place in the depths of Montenegro.

Here, an ancient nest emerges, and then dense layers of primordial antiquities appear inside the nest.

The cultivation of these primordial antiquities was high and low, the low ones were only six or seven primordial ancestors, and the high ones were as high as the early and middle stages of the eightfold primordial ancestors.

The dense collection of primordial artifacts occupied almost the entire interior of the nest, and then came out of the nest again, and these primordial artifacts were completely controlled.

Afterwards, they entered a large sacrificial array.

When enough primordial artifacts arrived, the Sacrificial Array began.

Endless energy poured into the sacrificial formation, and at the same time, three supreme strengthening-level powerhouses attacked, using these energies to bombard and cut off the space-time barrier of the forbidden area.

These three supreme fortifiers are the three supreme fortifiers of the Nine-Winged Tribe, and they also sneaked in here just to help cut off the supreme fortified creatures in the forbidden area.

Rumble!!!!!

The inside and the outside should be combined, and one of the high-level fortified creatures who cut off the forbidden area also took action.

The timing of their selection was very good, and during this period, they were not suppressed by the seal that cut off the penalty area, so they were able to exert almost their full strength.

A supreme enhancer made a move, shaking the entire cut-off penalty area.

......

"What's going on?"

Ye Tian was a little shocked.

He felt that the entire severed forbidden area was trembling, and the aura of the powerhouse of the strengthening level was permeating, and it could not be concealed at all.

He knew very well that this was definitely a sign that a powerhouse of the Supreme Strength Substance Level or the Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestor level had made a move, and it didn't seem to be one yet.

In other words, something is definitely wrong with the cut-off of the forbidden area!

Other than that.

Ye Tian's other copy bodies also sensed this impact in the Truncated Mountain Range.

The interception of the forbidden area and the interception of the black mountain outside the forbidden area both have traces of this kind of reinforcement-level shot, which is absolutely unimaginable.

For the first time, the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor came out of the Truncated Xuanlou, but he didn't dare to investigate, but notified the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building as soon as possible.

When it comes to the matter of the strongest of the strongest level, he can't solve the problem if he goes, and he will fall if he is not careful.

"Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor, what the hell is going on?"

Ye Tian asked.

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor said: "There is a supreme enhancement level powerhouse attacking the space-time barrier that cuts off the forbidden area, and I feel the unimaginable energy and the breath of life of countless primordial antiquities. According to my inference, this is the case only when countless primordial artifacts are sacrificed at the fortification level!"

"Sacrifice countless primordial artifacts, why is that?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

What's the point of attacking and cutting off the box?

At this time, Shi Chao Dao Ancestor said a guess: "Actually, there has always been a rumor in the Silent Black Sea, that is, the truncation of the Black Mountain is a seal, and the truncation of the forbidden area is to be sealed by the Truncation of the Black Mountain. That's why those creatures inside the forbidden area can't get out. Now there is a time-space barrier that has been strengthened to cut off the forbidden area, and it may be breaking the seal!"

When Ye Tian heard this, he immediately understood that this matter was really serious, and they couldn't intervene, so they could only wait for the arrival of the Nine-Fold Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building and other top powers.

......

Cut off the exclusion zone.

The space-time barrier was collapsing, and at the moment when the space-time barrier was broken, a sealing barrier emerged.

However, under the sacrifice of many supreme enhancement level internal and external attacks and massive primordial artifacts, one part of this sealing barrier began to crack.

"Quick!"

"It must be broken as soon as possible, otherwise if those Supreme Ninefold Ancestors of the Silent Black Sea interfere, this plan will fail!"

Finally, after a few breaths, a small piece of the sealing barrier was completely broken, forming a huge passage.

At the moment when the seal was broken, a supreme enhancement-level creature walked out of the Severed Forbidden Zone, and the furious aura seemed to cover the entire Intercepted Black Mountain in an instant.

"I, Akagi, have finally come out of the Cut-off Zone!"

A loud laugh rang out across the Quartet.

The countless creatures of the Truncated Boundary and the Hanhai Boundary seemed to have heard it.

Monolithic tribes.

"Those most fortified creatures that cut off the exclusion zone have come out?"

Bloodstone shuddered.

The Boulder Tribe is nearby, and it is naturally very close to the Forbidden Zone, if those creatures can come out, it will be a huge threat to the Boulder Tribe!

If these creatures want to occupy a territory, their megalith tribe will be destroyed in an instant!

......

Near the truncated Xuanlou, several Supreme Ninefold Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building appeared, including Dongchen Dao Ancestor.

"Dongchen Dao Ancestor, Qingshan Dao Ancestor, Barong Dao Ancestor!"

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor said respectfully.

Dongchen Daozu nodded slightly, then stared at the Forbidden Zone, and couldn't help sighing: "It's a step too late, I didn't expect that the Supreme Enhancement Beings who cut off the Forbidden Zone would actually cooperate with the Nine-Winged Tribe of the Primordial Ancient Sea." The Nine-Winged Tribe sacrificed countless primordial artifacts, and then dispatched three supreme strengthening-level powerhouses to help cut off the forbidden area and break a small seal, allowing this group of supreme strengtheners to come out of the truncated forbidden area! Although the seal has not been completely broken, there is not much suppression for them, and they can still come and go freely. "

Barong Daozu said: "It can't be changed now, I hope these creatures who cut off the forbidden area don't mess around, otherwise a big war will be avoidable!"

"These powerhouses are not primordial antiquities, they are just special creatures, and they are scarce in number, they shouldn't start a war with us, there is no benefit at all to start a war with us!"

"Who knows if this group of supreme enhancements will go crazy?"

Soon, more than a dozen Supreme Ninefold Ancestors of the Silent Black Sea came, all of them in this vicinity.

Cut off near the exclusion zone.

Akagi and Blood Desolation have met with the three supreme strengthening-level powerhouses of the Nine Wings Tribe.

One of the Supreme Strengtheners of the Nine-Winged Tribe said, "Blood Famine, we have completed the task, give us the remaining Eternal Flint Stone!"

Blood Desolation casually threw an eternal flint over and said, "Give it to you!"

After the Nine-Winged Tribe obtained the Eternal Flint Stone, they retreated as soon as possible.

There are only three of them to the level of reinforcement, and there are not only three of them who have cut off the forbidden area, but thirty-eight, what a terrifying number!

And the number of Supreme Nine Ancestors of the many great forces in the Silent Black Sea together is only a few dozen, although it is a little more than the Forbidden Zone, but it is not much more.

But how big is the silent Black Sea, and how big is the mere truncation of the forbidden area? There is no comparison at all!

It is also true that these primordial artifacts are not in the Silent Black Sea, so they are not worried about cutting off the forbidden zone.

But the Supreme Nine Ancestors of the Silent Black Sea are worried, after all, everyone is above the Silent Black Sea.
